query: SELECT l.id, l.nome, l.corretorId, l.naLixeira, u.name as corretor_nome, u.equipeId FROM leads l LEFT JOIN users u ON l.corretorId = u.open_id WHERE l.status = 'contrato_fechado' ORDER BY l.id
